User request:
Plan a minimal verification workflow for this repository. Return only markdown plan bullets.
tasks.planText:
# Minimal Verification Workflow Plan

## Environment Setup
- Verify Node.js >= 18 and npm are installed
- Install project dependencies with `npm ci`
- Ensure `.env` file exists with required variables (DISCORD_TOKEN, etc.)

## Build Verification
- Run `npm run build` to compile TypeScript
- Verify no compilation errors
- Check that `dist/` directory contains compiled JavaScript

## Core Functionality Tests
- Run `npm test` to execute existing test suite
- Verify all tests pass (opencode-bridge, runtime-transport, planner-safety)
- Check test output for any failures

## CLI Commands Smoke Test
- Test `opencode-planner-bridge --help` shows usage
- Verify `opendiscord` command exists after build
- Test basic CLI parsing with invalid arguments shows error

## Service Initialization
- Start HTTP server briefly with `npm run dev:cli &` (background)
- Verify server starts without errors on port 3000
- Stop background process after 2 seconds
- Repeat for MCP server with `npm run dev:mcp &`

## Task Store Validation
- Verify JSON task store creates/reads/writes properly
- Check data directory for task persistence
- Test basic CRUD operations through orchestrator

## Cleanup
- Remove any temporary test files created
- Ensure no processes are left running
- Verify git status shows no unintended changes

## Success Criteria
- All verification steps complete without errors
- Build and test commands exit with code 0
- Services start and bind to expected ports
- No linting or type errors reported
- Core workflow components initialize correctly
